summary: Implement user authentication with SSO support
description: Build a single sign-on authentication flow that integrates with the existing identity provider. Users should be able to log in using their corporate credentials without a separate password.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can log in with corporate SSO credentials
Session tokens expire after 8 hours of inactivity
Failed login attempts are logged and alerted after 5 failures
objective: Allow users to authenticate using corporate SSO
expectedOutcome: Users can log in without a separate password
successConditions: Login succeeds with valid SSO token

summary: Fix data export failure for files larger than 2GB
description: The export feature crashes with an out-of-memory error when the file size exceeds 2GB. Implement streaming export to handle large files without loading the entire file into memory.
acceptanceCriteria: Files up to 10GB can be exported without error
Export progress is shown to the user
objective: Prevent out-of-memory crashes during large file exports
expectedOutcome: Files of any supported size can be exported reliably
successConditions: Memory usage stays below 512MB during export
validationRules: File size must not exceed configured maximum

summary: Add rate limiting to the API gateway
description: Implement rate limiting on the API gateway to prevent abuse and protect backend services. Each client should be limited to a configurable number of requests per minute.
acceptanceCriteria: Requests exceeding the rate limit receive a 429 response
Rate limit headers are included in all API responses
Limits are configurable per client tier
objective: Protect the API from abuse and ensure fair usage
expectedOutcome: API is protected with configurable per-client rate limits
successConditions: Rate limit triggers correctly at configured threshold
No false positives for legitimate traffic
validationRules: Rate limit must be positive integer
Burst allowance must not exceed 2x rate limit
